nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: FastAPI backend: scraping, search, Gemini AI structuring, rate limiting, key validation.

nodes.name: ScrapeRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for scrape endpoint input (url, user_gemini_key).

nodes.name: SearchRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for search endpoint input (query, user_gemini_key).

nodes.name: MediaItem
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: url, type, alt for a media element.

nodes.name: LinkItem
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: text, url for a hyperlink.

nodes.name: DataTable
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: title, headers[], rows[][] for a data table.

nodes.name: StructuredResult
nodes.summary: Pydantic response model: page_title, page_summary, headings, paragraphs, media, links, external_links, data_tables.

nodes.name: ScrapeResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response: url, page_type, structured_data (StructuredResult), raw_markdown.

nodes.name: SearchResultItem
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: title, description, price, image_url, source_url.

nodes.name: SearchStructuredResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: search_summary, results[] (SearchResultItem).

nodes.name: SearchResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response: query, sources, page_type, structured_data (SearchStructuredResponse).

nodes.name: ValidateKeyRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: user_gemini_key.

nodes.name: ValidateKeyResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic model: valid (bool), error (str|None).

nodes.name: _PageClassification
nodes.summary: Pydantic schema for Pass-1 classifier JSON (page_type).

nodes.name: _key_id
nodes.summary: SHA256-hash first 16 chars of a Gemini key for rate-limit tracking.

nodes.name: check_rate_limit
nodes.summary: Raises HTTP 429 if daily limit (10) exceeded for this key. Increments counter.

nodes.name: _pre_clean_markdown
nodes.summary: Strips HTML tags, scripts, nav/header/footer blocks, entities, and normalizes whitespace from raw markdown.

nodes.name: _smart_truncate
nodes.summary: Keeps head 70% + tail 30% of text when exceeding max_chars.

nodes.name: _is_amazon_url
nodes.summary: Checks if URL hostname contains amazon.

nodes.name: fetch_markdown_via_jina
nodes.summary: Fallback: fetches markdown via Jina AI reader (r.jina.ai).

nodes.name: fetch_markdown_via_primary_scraper
nodes.summary: Primary scraper: POSTs to firecrawl /v1/scrape, returns (markdown, links). Falls back to Jina on failure.

nodes.name: search_via_primary_scraper
nodes.summary: Searches via firecrawl /v1/search, returns list of result dicts.

nodes.name: _classify_page_sync
nodes.summary: Pass-1: classifies page as ECOMMERCE/ARTICLE/DIRECTORY_OR_LIST/GENERAL using Gemini. Runs synchronously in thread.

nodes.name: classify_page
nodes.summary: Async wrapper for _classify_page_sync with caching.

nodes.name: _call_gemini_sync
nodes.summary: Pass-2 router: builds prompt with system+constraints, routes gemini-3.1-pro-preview to raw HTTP v1beta, gemini-1.5-pro to HTTP v1, flash models to SDK.

nodes.name: _call_gemini_v1_pro_sync
nodes.summary: Delegates to _call_gemini_v1_http_sync with model=gemini-3.1-pro-preview.

nodes.name: _call_gemini_v1_http_sync
nodes.summary: Generic raw HTTP call to Gemini REST API. Auto-selects v1beta for preview models, v1 for stable. 120s timeout, full error handling.

nodes.name: _call_gemini_sdk_sync
nodes.summary: SDK-based Gemini call for flash/lite models. Uses genai.Client with schema enforcement and thinking mode.

nodes.name: structure_with_gemini
nodes.summary: Async retry loop (5 attempts). 4-tier fallback: gemini-3.1-pro-preview → flash → flash-lite → 1.5-pro. External item+section validation with strict_count re-extraction. Brute-force JSON recovery.

nodes.name: _count_extracted_items
nodes.summary: Counts total items in Gemini output: data_tables rows + media + links.

nodes.name: _count_input_sections
nodes.summary: Counts H2/H3 headings in markdown to estimate input sections.

nodes.name: _count_output_sections
nodes.summary: Counts sections in output: max(data_tables.length, headings.length).

nodes.name: _count_expected_items
nodes.summary: Estimates expected item count from markdown patterns: bullets, table rows, heading-delimited sections.

nodes.name: fallback_structure_from_markdown
nodes.summary: Regex-based fallback when Gemini fails. Extracts links, images, headings, paragraphs, tables, prices, ratings.

nodes.name: _build_structured_result
nodes.summary: Normalizes raw dict into validated StructuredResult. Merges primary scraper links with Gemini links.

nodes.name: health
nodes.summary: GET / — returns service status JSON.

nodes.name: validate_key
nodes.summary: POST /validate-key — raw HTTP GET to Google API to check key validity.

nodes.name: get_usage
nodes.summary: GET /usage — returns used/limit/remaining for a Gemini key.

nodes.name: scrape_and_structure
nodes.summary: POST /scrape-and-structure — full pipeline: rate limit → scrape → classify → extract → fallback → response.

nodes.name: search_and_structure
nodes.summary: POST /search-and-structure — search pipeline: rate limit → primary scraper search → map metadata → response (no Gemini).

nodes.name: firebase
nodes.summary: Firebase init: exports auth, db (Firestore), isConfigured flag. Config from env vars.

nodes.name: saveHistory
nodes.summary: Saves scrape result to Firestore users/{uid}/history. Enforces FIFO limit of 5.

nodes.name: loadHistory
nodes.summary: Loads all history entries for a user from Firestore, newest first.

nodes.name: deleteHistoryEntry
nodes.summary: Deletes a single history doc from Firestore.

nodes.name: clearHistory
nodes.summary: Deletes all history docs for a user.

nodes.name: getDailyScrapeCount
nodes.summary: Reads daily scrape count from Firestore users/{uid} doc.

nodes.name: incrementDailyScrapeCount
nodes.summary: Increments daily scrape count in Firestore users/{uid} doc.

nodes.name: AuthProvider
nodes.summary: React context provider: manages Firebase auth state, provides signInWithGoogle, signInWithGitHub, signOut.

nodes.name: useAuth
nodes.summary: React hook to consume AuthContext.

nodes.name: RootLayout
nodes.summary: Root layout: wraps app in AuthProvider, renders Header + children.

nodes.name: Home
nodes.summary: Main page: redirects to /login if unauthenticated, renders NexusDashboard if authenticated.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Top navigation bar: logo, theme toggle, user profile dropdown, sign out.

nodes.name: NexusDashboard
nodes.summary: Main dashboard: URL/search input, API key management, extraction orchestration, result rendering, history sidebar, data exports.

nodes.name: handleExtract
nodes.summary: Core extraction handler: validates input/key/limits → POST to backend → parse response → save history → render.

nodes.name: cancelExtraction
nodes.summary: Cancels in-flight extraction before API call fires.

nodes.name: downloadBlob
nodes.summary: Creates a temporary anchor to trigger browser file download from a Blob.

nodes.name: exportJSON
nodes.summary: Exports full structured_data as JSON file.

nodes.name: exportCSV
nodes.summary: Exports a single DataTable as CSV file.

nodes.name: exportSectionJSON
nodes.summary: Exports any data section as a named JSON file.

nodes.name: exportSectionTXT
nodes.summary: Exports string array section as a named TXT file.

nodes.name: loadFromHistory
nodes.summary: Restores a previous extraction result from history sidebar.

nodes.name: deleteHistory
nodes.summary: Deletes a history entry from Firestore or localStorage.

nodes.name: handleClearHistory
nodes.summary: Clears all history for the user.

nodes.name: WebExtractor
nodes.summary: Legacy: fetches HTML via requests, parses with BeautifulSoup, extracts title/headings/paragraphs/links.

nodes.name: fetch_data
nodes.summary: HTTP GET to URL, stores raw_html. Returns bool success.

nodes.name: parse_html
nodes.summary: Parses raw_html with BeautifulSoup, returns dict of title, headings, paragraphs, links, metadata.

nodes.name: save_to_json
nodes.summary: Writes data dict to JSON file.

nodes.name: universal_ai_scraper
nodes.summary: Legacy CLI scraper: 5-layer pipeline (DOM acquisition → clean → Gemini parse → validate → output).

nodes.name: extract_raw_dom_data
nodes.summary: Fetches page via firecrawl SDK, returns raw markdown.

nodes.name: pre_clean_markdown
nodes.summary: Strips HTML tags, entities, normalizes whitespace from markdown.

nodes.name: parse_with_gemini
nodes.summary: Sends cleaned markdown + schema to Gemini, returns parsed JSON dict.

nodes.name: validate_output
nodes.summary: Validates raw dict against ExtractionResult Pydantic schema.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates 5-layer pipeline: DOM → clean → Gemini → validate → print JSON.
